description_long: This surveillance camera features a robust, angular mounting arm in matte black, supporting a rounded, white main housing with a prominent lens assembly. The lens is encased in a circular black bezel, with a red-tinted central element, suggesting advanced optics or possible night vision capability. The camera body is streamlined and smooth, with a small, dark panel on one side, likely for sensors or status indicators. The mounting bracket appears sturdy and allows for adjustable positioning, suitable for various urban installations. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with a focus on durability and weather resistance. The color contrast between the black arm and white housing enhances visibility and deterrence.
description: A modern surveillance camera with a black angular mounting arm and a smooth, white rounded housing featuring a prominent lens and sensor panel. The design is robust and suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular black mounting arm and the oval white camera housing with a visible black bracket.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular lens assembly with a red center and a small sensor panel on the right side of the housing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, white back of the housing and the mounting arm connection, with minimal visible features.
description_view_3: Top view focusing on the flat, black mounting arm and the top of the camera housing, with the lens not visible.
